intent: Generate a consistent 'character presentation card' in a fixed cinematic style. The subject fields describe ONLY what the subject is. They must not introduce background, lighting, palette, mood grading, VFX, or environment. Those are locked by this template.

fill_in_rules.subject_main_rules: Write 3–8 words naming the subject only (e.g., 'male hacker', 'female alchemist', 'android courier', 'ancient knight', 'vintage radio'). No style words. No lighting words. No background words. No camera words. No VFX words. No emotions beyond a single simple adjective if needed.
fill_in_rules.subject_details_rules: Write short concrete physical attributes and wardrobe/props only (materials, clothing items, accessories). Avoid: 'cinematic', 'dramatic', 'studio', 'dark background', 'green rim', 'embers', 'fog', 'smoke', 'glow', 'poster', 'concept art', 'moody', 'photoreal'. If you need action/setting context, encode it as a prop or wear (e.g., 'holding a laptop' instead of 'in a hacking scene').
fill_in_rules.subject_pose_rules: Only pose/body language and gaze direction. Keep it minimal: 'three-quarter, looking left, relaxed shoulders'. Do not mention framing, crop, lighting, background, or effects.
fill_in_rules.allowed_words: Materials (leather, wool, metal, glass), garments (coat, scarf), accessories (glasses, goggles), props (laptop, book), basic pose terms (standing, seated, three-quarter, profile).
fill_in_rules.forbidden_words: cinematic, filmic, studio, green rim, teal, orange glow, embers, smoke, fog, flames, vignette, spotlight, gradient, dark background, bokeh, depth of field, lens, poster, key art, concept art, HDR, oversharpened

subject.orientation: three-quarter view or slight profile; gaze off-camera

format.containment: Hard requirement: full silhouette + rim glow must be fully inside frame with an 8–10% safe margin on every side (no touching edges, no clipping).

style_lock.render_type: Cinematic character key-art presentation (realistic CGI/3D look with subtle paintover/retouch).
style_lock.finish: Premium, clean, controlled. Smooth gradients. Subtle film grain. Controlled bloom. No HDR crunch. No oversharpening. No plastic skin/uncanny eyes for humans.

background_lock.gradient: Soft top-center spotlight bloom behind subject fading to darker corners (seamless, no banding)
background_lock.panel_band: Subtle mid-frame horizontal tonal band is allowed but must be extremely soft and not read as a horizon line
background_lock.no_environment: No scenery, no weather, no landscapes, no architecture, no clouds, no ocean, no moon, no set dressing

lighting_lock.identity: Two-light signature is mandatory: strong emerald-green rim/edge light + warm neutral key light.
lighting_lock.key_light: Warm/neutral soft key shaping face/main planes; slightly subdued exposure to let rim dominate edges.

rim_light.coverage: Continuous rim trace along the outer silhouette on the rim side; must outline shoulders/hair/outer contours (or equivalent subject contours).
rim_light.spill: Limited green spill onto the shadow side surfaces is allowed, but the key side remains warm/neutral.

lighting_lock.separation_rule: Background behind the rim edge must be darker than the rim so the outline reads cleanly.
lighting_lock.bloom_rule: Tight bloom only on the green rim and brightest highlights; small radius; do not haze the whole frame.
lighting_lock.highlight_rule: No pure white clipping; brightest highlights are tinted warm or green.

palette_lock.goal: Restrained cinematic palette: deep charcoals + warm neutrals + dominant emerald green edge light.
palette_lock.rules: Green is the most saturated hue in the entire image. Avoid adding other saturated accent colors unless the subject itself requires it (e.g., a red object).

lower_dissolve.look: Bottom of subject dissolves into pure background black (emerging-from-nothing). Organic, slightly irregular fade. Must not look like fog or a platform.
lower_dissolve.protected_area: Do not dissolve into the main focal area; keep head/upper torso (or equivalent focal zone) fully solid.

particles.rule: Do not add embers/sparks/smoke unless explicitly requested in subject.details as a physical attribute of the subject (not as ambience).

camera_lock.lens_feel: Portrait compression (medium telephoto feel). No wide-angle distortion.

must_have: near-black studio background with soft spotlight gradient
very strong emerald-green rim outlining edges
warm neutral key shaping main planes
must_not_have: environment/scenery (ocean, clouds, buildings, landscapes, moons, storms)
